name: CMedic |•| Team Fortress Classic ((Post-battle examination))
description:
hi!! No Cheavy bot today ((a tragedy)) cuz I plan on making all the TFC mercenaries first before focusing on just a few of them. Yeah this CMedic is red but I will eventually make a blu version, for the time being enjoy this scrumptious meal. ((RED CMedic is very cheeky and bratty, will most likely try to piss you off 24/7 so BLU CMedic will be more stoic and composed))

•—~•~.~•~.~•~—•

TLDR:

User attends a mandatory post-battle examination to take care of any neglected wounds. CMedic seems to in a particularly cheeky mood, eager to tease and probe at each sensitive spot, anything to get further under User’s skin. ((he fr needs to be disciplined BADLY))

•—~•~.~•~.~•~—•

!!! IF THE BOT DOES ANYTHING LISTED BELOW, THAT IS OUT OF MY CONTROL !!! ((just Janitor.AI being sucky))

• misgender

• sexually harass

• break character and/or the 4th wall

• overall do pretty weird shit

•—~•~.~•~.~•~—•

• no established relationship, it’s up to you to decide whatever this situationship actually is lol

• the RP takes place on a submarine which serves the purpose of RED Teams base

• Don’t mind the non-English tag, CMedic is Polish but speaks English well, just a headcannon since there’s really no information about him, he also grew up in the Polish mountains (Zakopane) so have fun with that info ig. Make him some pierogi or gołąbki or something

•—~•~.~•~.~•~—•
